things_to_avoid: Don't mention that beach is 10min walk uphill in summer heat
Avoid promising "sea view from every room" — only visible from balcony
operational_notes: Gate code frequently changes — verify before each check-in
Elevator sometimes slow — mention stairs as alternative for 4th floor
Parking spots are shared — first come first served

response_templates.post_checkout: Thank you for staying at Grand Baie Heights! We hope you enjoyed the sea views. Safe travels!
